info.title: LedgerLens API
info.description: LedgerLens REST API for Stellar wallet risk scoring, alert management, AMM pool risk, cross-chain linking, and compliance exports. See [ReDoc](/redoc) for an alternative documentation view.

get.description:
Return combined analyst view for ``wallet``.

Response sections:
1. current_score      — latest RiskScore record
2. shap_top_10        — top-10 SHAP feature contributions
3. trade_timeline     — last 30 days of scoring events
4. ring_membership    — wash-trading rings containing this wallet
5. score_trend        — historical score values (last 30 days)
6. open_alerts        — typed manipulation alerts for this wallet

parameters.name: asset_pair

schema.description: Asset pair to focus on (optional; defaults to highest-scored pair)
schema.title: Asset Pair

parameters.description: Asset pair to focus on (optional; defaults to highest-scored pair)

schema.title: Response Analyst Wallet View Analyst Wallet  Wallet  Get

post.description:
Claim a wallet for review.

Atomically assigns the wallet to the requesting analyst if unassigned or
the existing lock has expired.  Returns 409 if actively claimed by another
analyst, or 429 if the analyst has reached the claim cap.

schema.title: Response Claim Analyst Wallet Analyst Wallet  Wallet  Claim Post

post.description:
Release an analyst's claim on a wallet.

Returns 404 if no active claim exists for this analyst on this wallet.

schema.title: Response Release Analyst Wallet Analyst Wallet  Wallet  Release Post

post.description:
Capture analyst verdict for ``wallet``.

Requires an active claim held by the submitting analyst_key_hash.
The verdict is stored in ``analyst_feedback`` and is available to the
active learning loop via ``GET /analyst/feedback?since=<ISO_TIMESTAMP>``.

Accepted verdicts: ``confirmed_wash``, ``false_positive``, ``needs_review``.

schema.title: Response Submit Feedback Analyst Wallet  Wallet  Feedback Post

get.description:
Return the top ``limit`` wallets awaiting analyst review, sorted by score desc.

A wallet is "awaiting review" when it has a risk score >= threshold and
has not been reviewed today.  Each item includes assignment state:
``is_assigned``, ``assigned_to``, and ``lock_expires_at``.

schema.title: Response Analyst Queue Analyst Queue Get

get.description:
Return aggregate analyst review statistics.

Response fields:
- cases_reviewed_today: int
- false_positive_rate_30d: float (0.0–1.0)
- avg_review_time_seconds: float | None

schema.title: Response Analyst Stats Analyst Stats Get

get.description:
Return SLA and case-management metrics.

Response fields:
- avg_time_to_claim_seconds: float | None
- avg_time_to_resolution_seconds: float | None
- assigned_count: int
- unassigned_count: int
- expired_reclaimed_count: int

schema.title: Response Analyst Case Stats Analyst Case Stats Get

get.description:
Export analyst feedback records for the active learning loop (Issue #052).

Consumed by the retraining pipeline to ingest human labels.  Returns all
feedback submitted on or after ``since`` in ascending chronological order.

Example: ``GET /analyst/feedback?since=2026-06-01T00:00:00Z``

parameters.name: since

schema.description: ISO-8601 timestamp; returns all feedback submitted at or after this time
schema.title: Since

parameters.description: ISO-8601 timestamp; returns all feedback submitted at or after this time

schema.title: Response Analyst Feedback Export Analyst Feedback Get

get.summary: Get GNN ring membership score for a wallet
get.description: Returns the GNN-computed ring membership probability [0,1] for the given Stellar wallet address, plus the top-5 most similar neighbouring wallets by embedding cosine similarity.  When the GNN model is not loaded, the score falls back to the binary SCC membership value.

parameters.name: k

schema.description: Number of top neighbours to return.
schema.title: K

parameters.description: Number of top neighbours to return.

get.description: Return GNN detector status — whether model is loaded and its config.

get.summary: Get scoring event history for a wallet
get.description: Returns the full chronological scoring event history for the given wallet address. Requires admin API key.

schema.title: Response Get Wallet Audit Log Audit Wallet  Wallet  Get

get.summary: Verify the audit chain integrity for a wallet
get.description: Walks the scoring event chain for the wallet, recomputing each chain hash. Returns VALID, TAMPERED (with first failing event ID), or no_events.
Returns aggregate statistics for the audit log: events in the last 24 hours, unique wallets scored, and integrity violations detected.

get.summary: Get temporal pattern analysis for a wallet
get.description: Returns ARIMA residual, LSTM reconstruction loss, IAT variance, and burst synchrony component scores, plus the composite temporal_anomaly_score. Includes a base64-encoded PNG of the 48-step trade sequence. Wallets with too few trades return all scores as 0.0.

get.summary: Subscribe to real-time score updates via SSE
get.description: Server-Sent Events endpoint. Provide comma-separated Stellar wallet addresses (max 50) to subscribe to score updates. On reconnect, send the `Last-Event-ID` header to replay missed events from the last 5 minutes.

parameters.name: wallets

schema.description: Comma-separated Stellar wallet addresses to subscribe to (max 50 chars per address, max 50 wallets per connection).
schema.title: Wallets

parameters.description: Comma-separated Stellar wallet addresses to subscribe to (max 50 chars per address, max 50 wallets per connection).

parameters.name: Last-Event-ID

schema.description: Last received SSE event ID for reconnect replay.
schema.title: Last-Event-Id

parameters.description: Last received SSE event ID for reconnect replay.

get.description: Return GNN model architecture summary and last inference time.

schema.title: Response Gnn Stats Admin Gnn Stats Get

get.description:
Return a causal explanation of the risk score for ``wallet``.

Unlike SHAP, which conflates causal and correlational contributions, this
endpoint returns *causal* average treatment effects (ATEs) estimated via
do-calculus interventions on the fitted structural causal model.

Response fields
---------------
- ``feature_ate_table``: ATE of each feature on risk_score — the expected
  change in score if that feature alone is moved from 0 to 1.
- ``top_causal_features``: top-3 features by absolute ATE.
- ``counterfactual_score``: predicted score if ``feature_override`` were
  applied (only present when ``feature_override`` is supplied).
- ``coverage_note``: advisory note about sample size and estimate quality.

Security
--------
- ``feature_override`` is strictly validated: feature must be a known
  observable feature name; value must be a finite float in [-1000, 1000].
- Rate-limited to 10 requests per minute per IP.
- ``counterfactual_score`` is not cached publicly to prevent fingerprinting
  the model's sensitivity surface.

Errors
------
- **400** — invalid Stellar wallet address format.
- **404** — no scores found for the wallet.
- **422** — invalid ``feature_override`` format or value.
- **429** — rate limit exceeded (10 req/min per IP).
- **503** — causal model not available (insufficient training data, DoWhy
  not installed, or refutation gate triggered).

parameters.name: feature_override

schema.description: Optional feature override in 'feature=value' format. Returns counterfactual_score with the override applied. Example: 'wash_ring_membership=0.0'
schema.title: Feature Override

parameters.description: Optional feature override in 'feature=value' format. Returns counterfactual_score with the override applied. Example: 'wash_ring_membership=0.0'

get.description: Returns 200 (ok/degraded) or 503. Checks DB, model files, and circuit breakers.

schema.title: Response List Scores V1 Scores Get

get.description:
Return a waterfall-style SHAP explanation for ``wallet`` on ``asset_pair``.

Produces ranked per-feature SHAP contributions, the SHAP base value
(expected model output), and a human-readable summary sentence.

Requires ``X-LedgerLens-Admin-Key`` header for authentication.

- **200** — waterfall explanation returned.
- **404** — no feature vector or scores found for the given wallet.
- **422** — unknown ``model`` name.
- **503** — models were not loaded at startup.

parameters.name: asset_pair

schema.description: Asset pair to explain, e.g. XLM/USDC
schema.title: Asset Pair

parameters.description: Asset pair to explain, e.g. XLM/USDC

parameters.name: model

schema.description: Model to use for SHAP explanation (random_forest, xgboost, or lightgbm)
schema.title: Model

parameters.description: Model to use for SHAP explanation (random_forest, xgboost, or lightgbm)

get.description: Return minimal feature changes that would lower a wallet's risk score below the target threshold.

parameters.name: asset_pair

schema.description: Asset pair to generate counterfactuals for, e.g. XLM/USDC
schema.title: Asset Pair

parameters.description: Asset pair to generate counterfactuals for, e.g. XLM/USDC

schema.title: Response Wallet Counterfactual V1 Scores  Wallet  Counterfactual Get

get.description:
Return the latest score for `wallet` on each asset pair.

Applies allowlist / denylist overrides from the ``wallet_overrides`` table.
When the wallet has known EVM counterparts (bridge transfer records in the
database), the response includes a ``"cross_chain_links"`` field listing
the linked EVM wallets and the chain they were last seen on.  EVM RPC
endpoint URLs are never exposed in this response.

If the wallet is allowlisted, all scores are overridden to 0.
If denylisted, all scores are overridden to 100.

schema.title: Response Wallet Scores V1 Scores  Wallet  Get

get.description: Return globally similar wallets using precomputed GNN embeddings and ANN search.

get.description: Return the current deduplication state and event history for a wallet.

schema.title: Response Alert Dedup State V1 Alerts Dedup State  Wallet  Get

get.description:
Return manipulation alerts.

Without `alert_type`, returns `RiskScore` records at or above
`settings.risk_score_threshold` (legacy behaviour). With `alert_type`,
returns stored typed alerts (see `detection.storage.AlertType`), such as
`SANDWICH_ATTACK`, most recent first.

parameters.name: alert_type

schema.description: Filter typed manipulation alerts (e.g. SANDWICH_ATTACK). When omitted, returns risk scores at or above the threshold.
schema.title: Alert Type

parameters.description: Filter typed manipulation alerts (e.g. SANDWICH_ATTACK). When omitted, returns risk scores at or above the threshold.
